english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

The All-beneficent
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

has taught the Quran.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

He created man,
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

[and] taught him articulate speech.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

The sun and the moon are [disposed] calculatedly,
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

and the herb and the tree prostrate [to Allah].
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

He raised the heaven high and set up the balance,
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

declaring, ‘Do not infringe the balance!
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

arabic text: وَأَقِيمُوا الْوَزْنَ بِالْقِسْطِ وَلَا تُخْسِرُوا الْمِيزَانَ
english translation text:
Maintain the weights with justice, and do not shorten the balance!’
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

And the earth—He laid it out for mankind.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

In it are fruits and date-palms with sheaths,
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

grain with husk, and fragrant herbs.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

He created man out of dry clay, like the potter’s,
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

arabic text: وَخَلَقَ الْجَانَّ مِن مَّارِجٍ مِّن نَّارٍ
english translation text:
and created the jinn out of a flame of a fire.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

Lord of the two easts, and Lord of the two wests!
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

He merged the two seas, meeting each other.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

There is a barrier between them, which they do not overstep.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

From them emerge the pearl and the coral.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

arabic text: وَلَهُ الْجَوَارِ الْمُنشَآتُ فِي الْبَحْرِ كَالْأَعْلَامِ
english translation text:
His are the sailing ships on the sea [appearing] like landmarks.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

Everyone on it is ephemeral,
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

arabic text: وَيَبْقَىٰ وَجْهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ
english translation text:
yet lasting is the majestic and munificent Face of your Lord.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

arabic text: يَسْأَلُهُ مَن فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ ۚ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ هُوَ فِي شَأْنٍ
english translation text:
Everyone in the heavens and the earth asks Him. Every day He is engaged in some work.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

Soon We shall make Ourselves unoccupied for you, O you notable two!
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

arabic text: يَا مَعْشَرَ الْجِنِّ وَالْإِنسِ إِنِ اسْتَطَعْتُمْ أَن تَنفُذُوا مِنْ أَقْطَارِ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ فَانفُذُوا ۚ لَا تَنفُذُونَ إِلَّا بِسُلْطَانٍ
english translation text:
O company of jinn and humans! If you can pass through the confines of the heavens and the earth, then do pass through. But you will not pass through except by an authority [from Allah].
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

arabic text: يُرْسَلُ عَلَيْكُمَا شُوَاظٌ مِّن نَّارٍ وَنُحَاسٌ فَلَا تَنتَصِرَانِ
english translation text:
There will be unleashed upon you a flash of fire and a smoke; then you will not be able to help one another.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

arabic text: فَإِذَا انشَقَّتِ السَّمَاءُ فَكَانَتْ وَرْدَةً كَالدِّهَانِ
english translation text:
When the sky is split open, and turns crimson like tanned leather.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

arabic text: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا يُسْأَلُ عَن ذَنبِهِ إِنسٌ وَلَا جَانٌّ
english translation text:
On that day neither humans will be questioned about their sins nor jinn.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

arabic text: يُعْرَفُ الْمُجْرِمُونَ بِسِيمَاهُمْ فَيُؤْخَذُ بِالنَّوَاصِي وَالْأَقْدَامِ
english translation text:
The guilty will be recognized by their mark; so they will be seized by their forelocks and feet.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

arabic text: هَٰذِهِ جَهَنَّمُ الَّتِي يُكَذِّبُ بِهَا الْمُجْرِمُونَ
english translation text:
‘This is the hell which the guilty would deny!’
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

They shall circuit between it and boiling hot water.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

For him who stands in awe of his Lord will be two gardens.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

Both abounding in branches.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

In both of them will be two flowing springs.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

In both of them will be two kinds of every fruit.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

arabic text: مُتَّكِئِينَ عَلَىٰ فُرُشٍ بَطَائِنُهَا مِنْ إِسْتَبْرَقٍ ۚ وَجَنَى الْجَنَّتَيْنِ دَانٍ
english translation text:
[They will be] reclining on beds lined with green silk. And the fruit of the two gardens will be near at hand.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

arabic text: فِيهِنَّ قَاصِرَاتُ الطَّرْفِ لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَانٌّ
english translation text:
In them are maidens of restrained glances, whom no human has touched before, nor jinn.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

As though they were rubies and corals.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

Is the requital of goodness anything but goodness?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

Beside these two, there will be two [other] gardens.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

Dark green.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

In both of them will be two gushing springs.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

In both of them will be fruits, date-palms and pomegranates.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

In them are maidens good and lovely.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

Houris secluded in pavilions.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

arabic text: لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَانٌّ
english translation text:
Whom no human has touched before, nor jinn.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

arabic text: مُتَّكِئِينَ عَلَىٰ رَفْرَفٍ خُضْرٍ وَعَبْقَرِيٍّ حِسَانٍ
english translation text:
Reclining on green cushions and lovely carpets.
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

So which of your Lord’s bounties will you both deny?
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent

arabic text: تَبَارَكَ اسْمُ رَبِّكَ ذِي الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ
english translation text:
Blessed is the Name of your Lord, the Majestic and the Munificent!
Ar Rahman – The Beneficent
